2025 Fly-Ball Stability Analysis

Estimated BIP = AB - SO - HR + SF. Estimated FB = Estimated BIP * FB%. Bins use 2025 player/league rows.

Backtest weighted scores are league-normalized plus metrics regressed toward 100 with K=100. LD% uses Estimated BIP opportunities, HR/FB and FB Quality use Estimated FB opportunities, and BB/K uses BB + SO opportunities.
